items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a bulk waiver for recurring visits, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation or existence of this feature. The lack of specific evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the satisfaction of this requirement.
